blocks.label: Connect to WiFi
blocks.hint: Connect ESP32 to a WiFi network
blocks.codeTemplate:
import network
_wlan = network.WLAN(network.STA_IF)
_wlan.active(True)
if not _wlan.isconnected():
    _wlan.connect("{{ssid}}", "{{password}}")
    while not _wlan.isconnected():
        pass
print("WiFi connected:", _wlan.ifconfig())

blocks.label: HTTP GET
blocks.codeTemplate:
import urequests
res = urequests.get("{{url}}")
print("Status:", res.status_code)
print(res.text)
res.close()

blocks.label: HTTP POST
blocks.hint: Send JSON data to a URL
blocks.codeTemplate:
import urequests
res = urequests.post("{{url}}", json={{payload}})
print("Status:", res.status_code)
print(res.text)
res.close()

blocks.label: NTP Time Sync
blocks.hint: Sync ESP32 internal clock with internet time

blocks.label: MQTT Setup
blocks.codeTemplate:
from umqtt.simple import MQTTClient
mqtt_client = MQTTClient("{{client_id}}", "{{broker}}", user="{{user}}" if "{{user}}" else None, password="{{pwd}}" if "{{pwd}}" else None)
try:
    mqtt_client.connect()
    print("Connected to MQTT Broker!")
except Exception as e:
    print("MQTT Connect failed:", e)

blocks.label: MQTT Publish
blocks.hint: Publish a message to an MQTT Topic

blocks.label: ThingSpeak Write
blocks.hint: Publish a value to a ThingSpeak Field
blocks.codeTemplate:
import urequests
ts_url = "http://api.thingspeak.com/update?api_key={{api_key}}&field{{field}}=" + str({{value}})
try:
    res = urequests.get(ts_url)
    print("ThingSpeak Status:", res.status_code)
    res.close()
except Exception as e:
    print("ThingSpeak Update failed:", e)
